results.rendered_html: śrauṣaṭ ind. (prob. for śroṣat Subj. of √1. śru, ‘may he i.e. the god, hear us!’) an exclamation used in making an offering with fire to the gods or departed spirits (cf. vaṣaṭ, vauṣaṭ),  RV. ;  TS. ;  ŚBr.  (cf.  Pāṇ. viii, 2, 91 ).

results.rendered_html:
śrauṣaṭ indecl. in dem Opferausruf astu śrauṣaṭ (= śravaṇaṃ bhavatu  SĀY. ) gaṇa cādi zu  P. 1,4,57 . ūryādi zu 61 .  AK. 3,5,8 .  H. 1538 . astu śrauṣaṭpuro agniṃ dhiyā dadhe  ṚV. 1,139,1 .  TS. 1,6,11,1 . 3,3,7,2 .  ŚAT. BR. 1,5,2,16 . 18 . 8,3,20 . 2,5,2,44 . 12,3,3,3 . astu śrau3ṣaṭ  P. 8,2,91 .
— Vgl. vaṣaṭ, vauṣaṭ.
